description.value: Aura moderate abjuration and evocation; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 8,000 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This gleaming staff is made of polished silver and capped with a simple gemstone. It is frequently given as a gift to apprentice spellcasters upon completing their tutelage. The staff allows use of the following spells: Shield (1 charge) Magic missile (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff, magic missile, shield; Cost 4,000 gp.
